summary: Iter 4 full regression after GROWhere rebrand + INR localization. Backend: all 31/31 pytest tests PASS after updating expected values (app='GROWhere', tier amounts 500/1500/3500/7500, payment_transactions.currency='inr'). Verified in Mongo: all payment_transactions now have currency='inr' and correct INR amounts. Frontend smoke: /sponsor renders with GROWhere logo, tier panel shows ₹500/₹1,500/₹3,500/₹7,500 (en-IN format), TierPickerModal shows all 4 tier buttons with correct INR, pledge-only seedling flow works end-to-end (campaign raised went ₹0 → ₹500, backers 0 → 1). Landing page shows GROWhere + tier panel with INR amounts. No regressions in auth / suitability / zones / AI species / plantings / community.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:38-44 SPONSOR_CURRENCY='inr' + tier amounts are the single source of truth. Good.
server.py now 765 lines — still recommend splitting sponsorship router into /app/backend/routes/sponsorship.py.

Pledge-only checkout still has no auth+rate-limit guard (anonymous /pledge_only=true requests can inflate raised_amount). Carried over from iter 2/3. Not blocking for demo but should be addressed before prod.
SponsorSuccess page likely polls /checkout/status/ indefinitely on dead Stripe sessions — consider capping to N attempts. Carried over.
payment_transactions index: consider unique index on session_id and compound (campaign_id, payment_status, applied) to speed up the funded-update path.
test_credentials: demo@verdura.app / demo1234 — login works, note email domain intentionally kept as @verdura.app (DB user).
seed_data_creation: pytest creates TEST_ campaigns + pledges + stripe sessions in-run (currency=inr). Also visible in /sponsor: TEST_campaign (Bangalore, ₹2,000 funded), TEST_idem (₹1,00,000), TEST_stripe_no_credit (₹50,000). Safe to leave; prefixed TEST_ for cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file updated to new iter-3 INR values: EXPECTED_TIERS = {seedling:500, sapling:1500, grove:3500, forest:7500}; test_root expects app='GROWhere'; test_pledge_increments_and_funds uses target_amount=2000 (seedling+sapling=funded); test_stripe_status_pending_for_unpaid expects amount=3500 grove + currency='inr'. Full suite runs in ~18s. Frontend tier-modal data-testids: tier-seedling/sapling/grove/forest; pledge flow: sponsor-btn-{campaign_id} → tier-picker-modal → tier-{key} → pledge-only-toggle → checkout-submit. en-IN formatting uses toLocaleString('en-IN') so amounts appear as ₹1,500 ₹50,000 ₹1,00,000 (Indian lakh separator).
rca of the issue: No new bugs found in iter 4. Rebrand + currency migration clean.
